top_signals.title: Iranian scientist Kaveh Madani: ‘People don’t go to war for a drop of water’

top_signals.title: Mining’s nuclear reality check: SMRs are still not on miners’ shopping lists
top_signals.summary: Small and micro modular reactors are at the very bottom on miners’ low-carbon energy plans. That is striking given the hype around SMRs, the AI-driven nuclear revival and the increasingly bullish outlook for uranium.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Alamos expects lower Q2 output on Young-Davidson mine disruptions
top_signals.summary: The Canadian gold miner said the mine operation experienced two seismic events last week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Government procurement to prioritise national security
top_signals.summary: Chancellor and Chief Secretary to the Prime Minister announce new drive to use power of public spending to strengthen national security and economic resilience.

top_signals.title: Algorand plans ‘broad quantum resilience’ by 2027
top_signals.summary: Algorand is planning new accounts and consensus mechanisms designed to be resistant to the cryptography-breaking threat of quantum computers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Centrus Energy, Oklo sign multi-year nuclear fuel deal
top_signals.summary: Centrus said it would supply domestically produced HALEU to Oklo's flagship fast-fission SMRs -- known as Aurora -- for multiple years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
